channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Elon Musk turns Cybertruck explosion into a marketing moment
item.description: The new year started out with the worst kind of bang. In the early hours of January 1, an assailant exploded a Cybertruck in front of Trump Hotel in Las Vegas, using firework mortars and gas canisters.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Inside Pinterest’s quest to restore internet optimism
item.description: Most social media platforms have devolved into a network of bottom-feeders and rage-baiters. Yet somehow, Pinterest has kept its joy. According to Sprout Social’s 2024 content strategy report, more than half of social users think of Pinterest as “more positive” than other platforms.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: What to know about Apple's $95 million settlement of the snooping Siri case
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit that accused the company of turning its virtual assistant Siri into a snoop that eavesdropped on the users of iPhones and other trendy devices in a betrayal to its long-standing commitment to personal privacy.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AI PCs
item.description: Virtually every aspect of technology has been affected, and potentially improved, by artificial intelligence (AI). PCs are no exception. While the meaning of “AI PC” is still evolving, it generally refers to a computer specifically designed to excel at AI-powered tasks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Everything new on Paramount Plus in January 2025
item.description: Escape the January blues with a whole new slate of movies and TV shows coming to Paramount Plus this month.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Missing Yellowstone? Taylor Sheridan has a hit Western movie with 97% on Rotten Tomatoes on Paramount Plus you have to watch
item.description: Taylor Sheridan's western movie Hell or High Water on Paramount Plus is perfect if you're missing Yellowstone.
item.dc:creator: grace.morris@futurenet.com (Grace Morris), TechRadar

item.title: Apple denies wrongdoing but settles to pay $95 million cash (about $20 per class member) in Siri privacy suit
item.description: Apple agreed to pay $95 million in cash to settle a proposed class action lawsuit claiming that its voice-activated Siri assistant violated users’ privacy. A preliminary settlement was filed on Tuesday night in the Oakland, California federal court, and requires approval by U.S.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Apple to pay $95 million to settle lawsuit accusing Siri of eavesdropping
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit accusing the privacy-minded company of deploying its virtual assistant Siri to eavesdrop on people using its iPhone and other trendy devices.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Windsurf Cascade uses AI to help beginners code games and applications
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. I don’t know how to code.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: AI, power availability and Intel’s future
item.description: As 2025 kicks off, it’s time to dust off the crystal ball. Here are my data center predictions for the coming year. 1) Trump backs off on tech tariffs For all the handwringing, Trump has a history of not following through on his threats.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: GOP lawmakers request Yellen briefing on Chinese hackers' Treasury breach
item.description: Republican lawmakers are swiftly urging the Treasury Department to provide answers on a recent cybersecurity attack from China that infiltrated various workstations, as outlined in a letter obtained by The Hill. “This breach of federal government information is extremely concerning.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: US government says companies are no longer allowed to send bulk data to these nations
item.description: The US DoJ has issued a final rule to prevent the mass transfer of US citizen data to hostile nations.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: IA generativa en 2025: de la experimentación a la práctica real
item.description: Parece llegar a su fin el tiempo de que las empresas jueguen con la IA generativa: las organizaciones comienzan una nueva etapa en la que se reduce la experimentación para pivotar hacia logros de valor empresarial, con un enfoque en menos casos de uso pero más específicos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Fine-tuning Azure OpenAI models in Azure AI Foundry
item.description: Large language models (LLMs) like the OpenAI models used by Azure are general-purpose tools for building many different types of generative AI-powered applications, from chatbots to agent-powered workflows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What to do if your manager keeps watching your Instagram Stories
item.description: There are certain social media rules we can all agree on: Ghosting a conversation is impolite, and replying “k” to a text is the equivalent of a backhand slap (violent, wrong, and rude).
item.dc:creator: Steffi Cao, Fast Company

item.title: Receiving unexpected international calls? What you need to know
item.description: Beware scam calls: Avoid unknown numbers and protect your personal information. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about the increasingly common scam.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Verizon, Nvidia team up for enterprise AI networking
item.description: Verizon and Nvidia have partnered to build AI services for enterprises that run workloads over Verizon’s 5G private network. The new offering, 5G Private Network with Enterprise AI, will run a range of AI applications and workloads over Verizon’s private 5G network with Mobile Edge Compute (MEC).
item.dc:creator: Network World
